response.raw:
```jsx
const Modal = mirror({
  tag: 'div',
  base: {
    position: 'fixed',
    top: 0,
    left: 0,
    width: 'full',
    height: 'full',
    background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
    direction: 'horizontal',
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    zIndex: 100
  }
})

const ModalContent = mirror({
  tag: 'div',
  base: {
    background: '$surface.bg',
    padding: '$lg.pad',
    borderRadius: '$md.rad',
    direction: 'vertical',
    gap: '$md.gap',
    width: 400,
    position: 'relative'
  }
})

const App = () => (
  <Col>
    <Button 
      onClick={{ action: 'show', target: 'MainModal' }}
    >
      Open Modal
    </Button>

    <Modal name="MainModal" hidden>
      <ModalContent>
        <Row style={{ justifyContent: 'between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
          <Title>Modal Title</Title>
          <Button 
            onClick={{ action: 'hide', target: 'MainModal' }}
            style={{ background: 'transparent' }}
          >
            ✕
          </Button>
        </Row>
        
        <Text>Modal content goes here</Text>
      </ModalContent>
    </Modal>
  </Col>
)
```

response.reactCode:
const Modal = mirror({
  tag: 'div',
  base: {
    position: 'fixed',
    top: 0,
    left: 0,
    width: 'full',
    height: 'full',
    background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
    direction: 'horizontal',
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    zIndex: 100
  }
})

const ModalContent = mirror({
  tag: 'div',
  base: {
    background: '$surface.bg',
    padding: '$lg.pad',
    borderRadius: '$md.rad',
    direction: 'vertical',
    gap: '$md.gap',
    width: 400,
    position: 'relative'
  }
})

const App = () => (
  <Col>
    <Button 
      onClick={{ action: 'show', target: 'MainModal' }}
    >
      Open Modal
    </Button>

    <Modal name="MainModal" hidden>
      <ModalContent>
        <Row style={{ justifyContent: 'between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
          <Title>Modal Title</Title>
          <Button 
            onClick={{ action: 'hide', target: 'MainModal' }}
            style={{ background: 'transparent' }}
          >
            ✕
          </Button>
        </Row>
        
        <Text>Modal content goes here</Text>
      </ModalContent>
    </Modal>
  </Col>
)
